bounty.title: Memanto Bug & Exploit Challenge
riskNotes: The bounty is high competition and has many existing comments and PRs.
Find a low-overlap flaw before any public claim or PR.
Use private vulnerability reporting or maintainer email for sensitive security findings.
Owner approval is required before GitHub comments, forks, PRs, or social amplification.

platformBoundary.approvalGate: Do not comment publicly, fork, open a PR, publish exploit details, or run social amplification until the owner approves a non-duplicate target and disclosure route.
